message:
Modernize async I/O in from_mysql operator with co_withExecutor

Replace deprecated co_invoke + scheduleOn pattern with modern
co_withExecutor(evb, ...) for all async Transport operations (read, write,
connect, TLS handshake). Also fix Result::value() → Result::unwrap() calls
to match the new Rust-style Result API, and suppress nodiscard warning on
tls_options::validate().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
